predicates.name: employee_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds the annual average employee threshold (50 FTE) in the financial year.

predicates.name: turnover_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds the annual net turnover threshold (excluding VAT) in the financial year.

predicates.name: balance_sheet_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds the balance sheet total threshold in the financial year.

predicates.name: more_than_one_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds more than one of the three size criteria in the financial year.

predicates.name: is_small_company
predicates.description: The company qualifies as a kleine vennootschap (small company) on the balance sheet date of the last closed financial year.

predicates.name: is_linked_company
predicates.description: The two companies are linked (verbonden) as defined in article 1:20.

predicates.name: revenues_mostly_non_turnover
predicates.description: More than half of the company's ordinary revenues do not qualify as net turnover, triggering the alternative turnover definition.

predicates.name: consolidation_eliminations_applied
predicates.description: The required consolidation eliminations and omissions under the relevant royal decree are applied when computing consolidated balance sheet total and net turnover.

predicates.name: employees_registered_in_dimona
predicates.description: The company's employment falls within the scope of the DIMONA registration system for the financial year.

predicates.name: has_linked_companies
predicates.description: The company is linked to one or more other companies as defined in article 1:20, requiring consolidated calculation of criteria.

functions.name: annual_average_employees_fte
functions.description: The annual average number of employees expressed in full-time equivalents for the company in the financial year.

functions.name: annual_net_turnover_excl_vat
functions.description: The annual net turnover excluding VAT of the company in the financial year (in euros).

functions.name: balance_sheet_total
functions.description: The total book value of assets (balanstotaal) of the company in the financial year (in euros).

functions.name: total_operating_and_financial_revenues_excl_nonrecurrent
functions.description: The total of operating and financial revenues excluding non-recurrent revenues, used as alternative net turnover when ordinary revenues are mostly non-turnover (in euros).

functions.name: consolidated_annual_net_turnover_excl_vat
functions.description: The consolidated annual net turnover excluding VAT for the group of linked companies in the financial year (in euros).

functions.name: consolidated_balance_sheet_total
functions.description: The consolidated balance sheet total for the group of linked companies in the financial year (in euros).

functions.name: combined_average_employees_fte
functions.description: The sum of annual average employees in FTE across all linked companies in the financial year.
